scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:railway: pnpm --filter @workspace/restaurant-mgmt run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && rm -rf artifacts/api-server/dist/public && cp -R artifacts/restaurant-mgmt/dist/public artifacts/api-server/dist/public
scripts.db:push: node -e "if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL){console.error('ERROR: DATABASE_URL is not set. Add a PostgreSQL service in Railway and reference its DATABASE_URL variable on this service.');process.exit(1)}" && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push
scripts.db:push:force: node -e "if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL){console.error('ERROR: DATABASE_URL is not set. Add a PostgreSQL service in Railway and reference its DATABASE_URL variable on this service.');process.exit(1)}" && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push-force
